data.name: Hadaka Shitsuji - Naked Butlers
data.detailed_description:
You play as Tomoaki, a man down on his luck who accepts a suspiciously well-paying job to manage a luxurious mansion's butlers. After being granted complete authority and power over these hot butlers, it's up to you to decide how much you're willing to take advantage of them. Will you try to have a normal romance? Or will you let the power awaken something deep within you and see how far these butlers will go for you?

Naked Butlers is a solo project written, programmed, illustrated, etc. entirely by Mito Togo, out of sheer love and dedication towards butlers. 

Enjoy a wide variety of sex scenes with each hot butler as you progress the game.

The more things escalate between you and the sexy butlers, the more outrageous and preposterous the sexual acts become!

Or will you let the power awaken something deep within you and see how far these butlers will go for you?

Naked Butlers is a solo project written, programmed, illustrated, etc. entirely by Mito Togo, out of sheer love and dedication towards butlers. 

Enjoy a wide variety of sex scenes with each hot butler as you progress the game.

The more things escalate between you and the sexy butlers, the more outrageous and preposterous the sexual acts become!
data.short_description: Naked Butlers is a hardcore yaoi visual novel rife with dark comedy. Unleash your inner sadist and bully these hot butlers good in this solo project from a developer who absolutely loves butlers!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: Pentium 4+
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 64MB
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1650 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Direct Sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10+ Compatible
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 64MB
  • 儲存空間: 1650 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu or equivalent
  • 處理器: 1 Ghz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: VRAM 64MB
  • 儲存空間: 1650 MB 可用空間
